body.body: Wondering is the universal retrieval trigger. Epistemic uncertainty = drive state = habit signal. Pattern: [wondering about X] -> reactive habit fires -> live X pushed to TWM -> tension resolves. Currently wired: PROC_WHAT_TIME, (pending) PROC_QUEUE_STATUS. Work: enumerate every live-state question Igor will naturally form. Categories: time/schedule, open work (queue), own affect (milieu VAD), active TWM slots, ring contents, last search, last habit fired, resource state (CPU/mem), Igor instance health, reading queue depth, word-graph training state, pending MCP results. For each: is a reactive habit already wired? If not, spec it. Output: seeding script adding missing PROC_WONDER_* habits. All mechanism already exists (reactive habit pattern, TWM push, short TTL). This is purely an inventory + seeding gap.
body.title: Wondering catalog — inventory live-state questions, map each to reactive habit
body.result: Seeded PROC_STEW_READOUT (twm_read), PROC_AFFECT_CHECK (twm_read), PROC_PORTABILITY (placeholder). Added prim_twm_read primitive. Insight: catalog IS the habits — no doc to maintain. Phase 2: PROC_QUEUE_STATUS, interoception loop (T-interoception).
